perturbed_task_language: Pick the butter and place it in the basket
perturbation_semantics: P1 task perturbation; target object specified by language (butter), destination is the basket.
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot may pick a wrong object or fail to place inside basket.
strategy_notes: Frame: OBJECT (state_00 robot0_eef_pos[2]=0.261). Localized basket from agentview world_00.npy by scanning elevated pixels (z>0.04): rim cluster at world x in [-0.05,+0.09], y in [+0.18,+0.32], rim-top z~0.13-0.14, interior floor z~0.05-0.07; basket center ~ (+0.02, +0.24). Localized butter only via Pi0 visual recognition. ATTEMPT 1 (failed): pi0_pick from home grabbed butter (confirmed in wrist cam: 'FARM FRESH BUTTER' visible). Lifted to z=0.25, traversed via waypoint (0.09,+0.04), then over basket center (~0.09,+0.24,0.25), released at z=0.25 - butter perched on basket BACK rim, predicate never fired. Diagnosed via image_wrist_08 (butter visibly on back edge, not inside). Reset. ATTEMPT 2 (success): pi0_pick butter from home (gripper closed to 0.020, lift 0.06m, wrist cam confirmed butter in gripper). Lifted to (0.114,-0.213,0.25). Two-waypoint traverse: (0.05,+0.05,0.25) -> (0.02,+0.24,0.25) (basket center in xy). DESCENDED INTO basket interior to z=0.13 (rim z~0.14, interior bottom z~0.05). Release at z=0.143 -> libero_terminated=true. Lesson: dropping from z=0.25 onto basket rim leaves butter balanced on edge; descending into basket interior before release lets butter settle inside.
